parameters.query:
SELECT
team_name,
whatsapp_group,
priority_order
FROM zone_assignments
WHERE zone_name = '{{ $json.local_area }}'
ORDER BY
CASE
    WHEN case_type = '{{ $json.case_type }}' THEN 1
    WHEN case_type = 'DOWN' THEN 2
    ELSE 3
END,
priority_order ASC
LIMIT 1;

INSERT INTO cases (

case_number,
case_type,
customer_name,
customer_phone,
network_access,
local_area,
full_address,
description_text,
comment_text,
assigned_team,
whatsapp_group

)

VALUES (

'{{ ($json.case_number || "").replace(/'/g, "''") }}',

'{{ ($json.case_type || "").replace(/'/g, "''") }}',

'{{ ($json.customer_name || "").replace(/'/g, "''") }}',

'{{ ($json.customer_phone || "").replace(/'/g, "''") }}',

'{{ ($json.network_access || "").replace(/'/g, "''") }}',

'{{ ($json.local_area || "").replace(/'/g, "''") }}',

'{{ ($json.full_address || "").replace(/'/g, "''") }}',

'{{ ($json.description_text || "").replace(/'/g, "''") }}',

'{{ ($json.comment_text || "").replace(/'/g, "''") }}',

'{{ ($json.team_name || "").replace(/'/g, "''") }}',

'{{ ($json.whatsapp_group || "").replace(/'/g, "''") }}'

)

ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE

case_type = VALUES(case_type),
customer_name = VALUES(customer_name),
customer_phone = VALUES(customer_phone),
network_access = VALUES(network_access),
local_area = VALUES(local_area),
full_address = VALUES(full_address),
description_text = VALUES(description_text),
comment_text = VALUES(comment_text),
assigned_team = VALUES(assigned_team),
whatsapp_group = VALUES(whatsapp_group);

INSERT INTO whatsapp_logs (
case_number,
team_name,
whatsapp_group,
message_content,
sent_status,
created_at
)
VALUES (
'{{ $json.case_number }}',
'{{ $json.team_name }}',
'{{ $json.whatsapp_group }}',
'🚨 NOUVELLE CASE SAV - {{ $json.case_number }} - {{ $json.customer_name }}',
'SENT',
NOW()
);
